jsonLd.title: Entry-Level SEO Specialist at Pepperfry
jsonLd.description:
Join the Pepperfry family as a SEO Specialist in Mumbai. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Pepperfry:
Pepperfry is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform
• Collaborate with logistics partners to ensure timely delivery
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth
• Coordinate with vendors and suppliers for inventory management
• Develop and implement category growth strategies
• Manage customer reviews, ratings, and return/refund processes
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Magento
• Proficiency in Customer Segmentation
• Proficiency in Affiliate Marketing
• Proficiency in Content Writing
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in SEO/SEM
• Proficiency in Facebook Ads
• Proficiency in Google Analytics

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Learning & development budget
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Mumbai, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Pepperfry!
